tools.name: canon_scan
tools.title: Scan an MCP/skill manifest for supply-chain poisoning
tools.description: Paste an MCP server or skill manifest (JSON) and truecopy scans its tool names/descriptions for hidden instructions, exfiltration lures, and other poisoned-skill / tool-poisoning attacks. Returns a verdict (clean / flagged) and the findings. Vet a third-party tool BEFORE you trust it.

manifest.description: the MCP/skill manifest as JSON text

tools.name: keeper_lease
tools.title: Lease a credential — you get an opaque handle, never the secret
tools.description: Request a short-lived, scoped lease for a credential held in the strongroom vault. You receive a lease handle (id + scope + ttl); the secret itself is materialized only at the egress point when the lease is redeemed, and never enters your context. The named secret must already be in the vault.

name.description: the vault secret name to lease

host.description: restrict the lease to this destination host

tools.name: warden_check
tools.title: Is this action safe to run? (action firewall)
tools.description: Submit a tool action — { tool, input } — and get redstamp's verdict: decision (allow / approve / block), risk tier, and the reasons. Catches shell/exec, SSRF + cloud-metadata, secret exfiltration, dangerous writes/deletes, and prompt-injection in the arguments. Call this BEFORE executing any consequential tool call.

tool.description: the tool/action name, e.g. fetch, shell, write, delete, read

input.description: the arguments the tool would run with (url, command, path, content, …)
